global.description: The ad features a prominent savings message with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings with a free trial offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: RouteBloom logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'RouteBloom' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Savings message
elements.description: A prominent text area displaying 'Last-minute savings' in a large, eye-catching font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A circular badge indicating a discount of '-30%' in a bold font, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in the background, adding visual interest without distracting from the main message.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: An unspecified element that appears as a rectangular shape, possibly for additional text or imagery.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular element, possibly decorative, located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circular element, similar to the previous one, positioned to the right.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A third small circular element, located slightly below the previous circles.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A fourth small circular element, similar to the others, positioned towards the bottom left.

elements.label: Bottom element
elements.description: A small element at the bottom of the ad, possibly for additional branding or information.

elements.label: Savings details
elements.description: Text detailing the offer, '30% off hotels and flights in one tap', positioned at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings 30dte ARA tap Try for free

elements.label: RouteBloom headline
elements.description: A headline element featuring the brand name 'RouteBloom' in a bold font, located at the top.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and inviting, RouteBloom logo, last-minute savings message, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main savings message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings, 30% off hotels and flights in one tap, Try for free, RouteBloom
